name: Rimfire Pacific Mining NL
summary: Rimfire Pacific Mining NL engages in the exploration and evaluation of mineral deposits in Australia. The company explores for gold, silver, copper, platinum, cobalt, nickel, scandium, and base metal deposits. It primarily holds interests in the Fifield project covering an area of 915 square kilometers located at Fifield in New South Wales. The company was incorporated in 1988 and is headquartered in Melbourne, Australia.
